text:
1. `just install` — builds + copies the binary to `~/.bin/proactive-context` and codesigns it (the hooks invoke that path).
2. Wire `~/.claude/settings.json`: `UserPromptSubmit` → `~/.bin/proactive-context inject` (timeout 10), `SessionEnd` → `~/.bin/proactive-context capture` (timeout 120). [...] Assistant: Live config is correct (timeout 25s, Haiku selector, Sonnet compiler). Now the outer hook timeout — I set it to 10s earlier, which would kill a 25s inject. Bumping `UserPromptSubmit` to 30s:
 [...] All on `master`, built, tested (34/34), installed to `~/.bin`, hooks wired (`inject` timeout 30s / inner 25s, `capture` 120s). Live for your real sessions now.
